## Description

A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Type

- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] Improvement to existing feature
- [ ] Other

## Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the workflow it would improve.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this should work (optional).
